name: Asparagus Alla Milanese (Mm)
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring 4 quarts water to boil and set up ice bath.
2. Trim asparagus of hard ends and drop into water.
3. Cook for 70 seconds, then remove with tongs and refresh in the ice bath.
4. Drain and set aside.
5. In a 10-inch to 12-inch saute pan, heat 4 tablespoons butter until very dark brown.
6. Add asparagus and toss until warm. Remove asparagus and divide among 4 plates.
7. Wipe down the saute pan and add the remaining butter.
8. Cook until foam subsides.
9. Crack eggs in and cook sunny side up, about 2 minutes.
10. Place one egg over each plate, sprinkle with cheese, and serve.
